hero.title: Hi, I'm Gobinath S
hero.subtitle: MCA Student
hero.desc: Enthusiastic MCA (Pursuing) student with a strong foundation in programming, algorithms, and problem-solving. Skilled in Java, C, DSA, and MySQL. Eager to apply skills through internships and real-world projects while contributing to innovative software solutions.

about.text: Enthusiastic MCA (Pursuing) student with a strong foundation in programming, algorithms, and problem-solving. Skilled in Java, C, DSA, and MySQL. Eager to apply skills through internships and real-world projects while contributing to innovative software solutions.

projects.title: Registration Website
projects.desc: Developed a web-based registration system for managing participant data for the INEXON'26 symposium.

projects.title: Debugging Website
projects.desc: Built an interactive Java and C debugging platform for the INEXON'26 symposium technical event. Includes timed challenges and automatic evaluation to test participants' coding skills.

projects.title: Personal Portfolio Website
projects.desc: Developed a personal portfolio website to showcase my projects, technical skills, certifications, and academic achievements. Designed a responsive and user-friendly interface using modern web technologies.

projects.title: Spotify Clone
projects.desc: Developed a Spotify-inspired music streaming web application with a modern and responsive user interface. Implemented features such as music playback, playlist management, user authentication, and song search using React.js and Node.js.

projects.title: Online Movie Ticket Booking (Frontend)
projects.desc: Designed and developed the frontend of a movie ticket booking application. Implemented responsive UI for browsing movies, selecting seats, and simulating booking flow.

projects.title: Booking Management System
projects.desc: Developed a web-based Hall Booking Management System with role-based access control, calendar-based booking management, hall availability tracking, booking approvals, and user management. Built using React.js, Node.js, Express.js, and MongoDB.

education.school: Mahendra College of Arts and Science, Namakkal
